summary: Iteration 10 testing complete - All bug fixes and feature updates verified. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 10 test scenarios passed.

issues: Console warning: rgba color format not conforming to #rrggbb format in color picker - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: --- BUG FIX 1: Theme colors reflected on Display (no !important overrides) ---
themes.js makeTheme() now generates only marker comment: /* THEME:id */
No !important found in themes.js
Display.js uses inline styles for colors from settings
Display main area has inline gradient: linear-gradient(160deg, content_bg, header_bg)
Settings colors override theme CSS (verified #FF0000 header_bg persists to display)
--- BUG FIX 2: Default sizes in Settings ---
Settings page shows: time=32, date=22, weather=32, footer=22
Settings page shows: header_height=100, footer_height=50
Settings page shows: block_padding_v=4, block_padding_h=14
Frontend Settings.js useEffect merges defaults with API response
--- BUG FIX 3: WYSIWYG defaults ---
Backend accepts and persists: small=25, normal=40, medium=60, large=75, xlarge=90, huge=130
Frontend Settings.js has defaults object with correct WYSIWYG values
--- BUG FIX 4: Onyx default palette ---
Onyx theme colors: header=#0A0A0A, footer=#171717, content=#000000, text=#F5F5F5
Backend server.py default settings use Onyx colors
Themes page shows Onyx as active theme
--- BUG FIX 5: Eco mode default times ---
Eco mode switch found (data-testid='eco-mode-switch')
Eco mode times: start=22:00, end=07:00
Settings.js onCheckedChange sets defaults when toggling ON
--- BUG FIX 6: Ticker slower speed option ---
Ticker speed slider max=300 (verified via data-testid='ticker-speed-slider')
Backend accepts ticker_speed=300
--- BUG FIX 7: crypto.randomUUID removed ---
grep -r 'crypto.randomUUID' /app/frontend/src/ returns no results
TickerPage.js uses Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)
--- FEATURE: New animations (12 total) ---
Found all 12 animations: fondu-gradient, particules, diagonales, eclat, ruban, nebuleuse, flux, prisme, aurore, maille, horizon, none
Old animations NOT found: bokeh, cercles, pulse, brume, grille, vagues, lignes-fluides
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo client account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified all 7 bug fixes: (1) Theme CSS no longer has !important color overrides - themes.js makeTheme() returns only marker comment, Display.js uses inline styles. (2) Default sizes in Settings.js useEffect: time=32, date=22, weather=32, footer=22, header_height=100, footer_height=50, block_padding_v=4, block_padding_h=14. (3) WYSIWYG defaults: small=25, normal=40, medium=60, large=75, xlarge=90, huge=130. (4) Onyx is default palette with colors #0A0A0A/#171717/#000000/#F5F5F5. (5) Eco mode sets defaults 22:00-07:00 when toggled ON. (6) Ticker speed slider max=300. (7) crypto.randomUUID replaced with Date.now().toString(36).
